description: Use this API routine to modify a machine’s existing non-conventional source fault current contribution (NCSFCC) data or to add NCSFCC data to an existing machine in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.2.0. ierr = seq_machine_ncs_data(ibus, id, intgar, realar, namear)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_machine_ncs_data(ibus, id, intgar, realar, namear)

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying characteristic type; 0 for none, 1 for time dependent, 2 for voltage dependent. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying Real Options. (input).

parameters.name: namear
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying Specifies the names of the non- conventional source fault contribution (NCSFCC) tables. (input).

realar.description: IFMAX, per unit total current magnitude allowed during a fault (1.3 by default).
DBVMIN, per unit dead-band minimum voltage at POI (0.9 by default).
DBVMAX, per unit dead-band maximum voltage at POI (1.1 by default).

namear.description: positive sequence table name (blank by default).
negative sequence table name (blank by default).

error_codes.description: machine identifier is more than two characters.
no table specified for the positive sequence.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Invalid characteristic type flag. - Table not found. - Machine and table characteristic type mismatch. - IFMAX is less than 1.0. - DBVMAX is less than DBVMIN.
